rows.label: qev055404_MSG0001
rows.name:
The will Kun'eibu entrusted to you
remains strong within me as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055404_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please... you must fulfill the
promise you made with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055404_MSG0003
rows.name:
Senirapa Water is precious on this
Mira, but if you search far and wide,
you are bound to find it eventually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055404_MSG0004
rows.name:
Yes, as long as you continue
pursuing it without giving up,
just like Kun'eibu did...[ST:wait ]
